title: Assign subitems in various groups
excerpt:
Hi, 
I would love it to be possible to select subitems in various group/tasks, so i can assign the same subitems to one owner, edit subitems deadline, etc. 
  
Is there an other easy way to do it? 
thank you!

posts.author: Marine1 (Marine)
posts.cookedHtml:
